$comment: EXAMPLE ONLY - hook config schemas are preview-grade and differ across Copilot CLI / VS Code versions. Verify event names, file location, and payload fields against the CURRENT docs before installing (see INSTALL.md). Design intent: safety net anchors to WRITES, validation anchors to ENTRY, sessionEnd is a bonus. Every command is idempotent and safe at any frequency.

sessionStart.why: entry gate: validates the state the PREVIOUS work left behind

postToolUse.command: git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" add -A && git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" diff-index --quiet HEAD || git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" commit -q -m auto-write
postToolUse.why: safety net: every mutation captured the moment it lands; no-op-safe

sessionEnd.command: bash "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}/_harness/scripts/check_ticket_log.sh"; git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" add -A && git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" diff-index --quiet HEAD || git -C "${WORKSPACE_ROOT}" commit -q -m auto-session-end
sessionEnd.why: best-effort bonus only - nothing may depend on this firing
